name: D.D. Seeker
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>異</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>い</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>次</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>元</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>探</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>たん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>求</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: (Quick Effect): You can target 1 face-up monster you control; banish it until the End Phase of the next turn. You can only use this effect of "D.D. Seeker" once per turn.
mnst_eff: (Quick Effect): You can target 1 face-up monster you control; banish it until the End Phase of the next turn. You can only use this effect of "D.D. Seeker" once per turn.
eff: (Quick Effect): You can target 1 face-up monster you control; banish it until the End Phase of the next turn. You can only use this effect of "D.D. Seeker" once per turn.

action: Returns banished cards to the field
